axis_responsibility.Agent: Design-lead return supplies design observations and gaps only; it does not classify success/failure or approve quality.
axis_responsibility.Brick: Owns the declared work contract and deliverables; this return does not change Brick source truth.
axis_responsibility.Evidence: Checker/profile output, docs, UI rendering, and generated dashboard-data.json are support evidence/projections, not authority.
axis_responsibility.Link: No Movement or route target is chosen here; forward/reroute vocabulary is only displayed from observed Link evidence.
axis_responsibility.Support: Dashboard server, deploy doc, bake verb, and checker probes are support/projection mechanics only.

candidate_file_changes: support/dashboard/DEPLOY.md: keep, but consider adding exact parameterized IAP setup commands if required by the work step.
support/dashboard/server/index.mjs: keep production fail-closed guard and direct-run export seam.
support/operator/dashboard_export.py: keep bake_dashboard_snapshot() and --bake-dashboard CLI; verify write path in temp proof.
support/checkers/lib/kernel_checks.py: keep dashboard_productization; consider adding behavioral guard probe and clean-yard artifact check.
support/checkers/check_profile.py and profiles/read_side_projection_boundary.yaml: keep kernel registration/profile inclusion.
support/checkers/check_package_path_admission.py: keep DEPLOY.md admission and residue filters; verify this does not mask attempt-level artifact hygiene requirements.
support/dashboard/src/pages/Building.jsx and src/data/graph.js: candidate UI wording cleanup for pass/stop gate jargon.
support/dashboard/src/data/labels.js and src/pages/Link.jsx: current movement vocabulary cleanup aligns with forward/reroute display.
checker_or_verifier_plan: From a clean checkout/copy with writable temp: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPATH=support/import_identity python3 support/checkers/check_profile.py --profile read_side_projection_boundary.
Full gate from the intended checkout/copy: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPATH=support/import_identity python3 support/checkers/check_profile.py --all.
Copy support/dashboard to a temp dir outside the repo, then run npm ci and npm run build there; report the temp path and leave the repo without node_modules/dist artifacts.

Run bake round-trip with python3 -m brick_protocol.support.operator.dashboard_export --bake-dashboard --out <temp>/dashboard-data.json, then node/json shape-check summary/buildings/source_truth=false.
Run production fail-closed probe for missing, dev-secret, and non-dev INGEST_SECRET; verify static viewing route remains outside the ingest guard.
Negative controls: mutate the fail-closed guard, inject a concrete project/org/run.app/Smith literal, and weaken bake output shape; each should drive the productization checker RED.
returned.design_summary: Productize support/dashboard as a support-only, credential-free read-side projection: third-party access is delegated to infrastructure, app-level mutation is limited to env-only INGEST_SECRET for POST /ingest, static viewing stays available, seed snapshots are baked from dashboard_export_packet, and the dashboard must not become source truth, Movement authority, or a quality/success judge.
edge_cases: Cloud Run + IAP can block programmatic ingest; current doc treats baked snapshot redeploy as the reference fallback.
Scale-to-zero loses in-memory ingest state; cold start reloads baked dist/dashboard-data.json only.
Reverse proxies need SSE buffering disabled for /events.
Ignored node_modules/dist residue can still trip physical path-segment guards even when package admission residue-filters them.
Read-only sandbox prevented temp-dir based checker and bake probes, so source shape was observed but write-round-trip proof was not produced.
The accidental in-tree npm build attempt is not valid proof and should not be reused as evidence.
invariants: NODE_ENV=production plus missing or dev-secret INGEST_SECRET must fail closed for POST /ingest.
Static GET routes, SSE reads, and baked snapshot viewing must not require app-managed login or stored credentials.
INGEST_SECRET is the only app-level secret and is env-only; no credential/session/provider bodies are stored in code, docs, packets, or evidence.
Seed bake computes dashboard_export_packet and writes dashboard-data.json synchronously; no scheduler or polling is opened.
Deployment docs stay company-neutral and parameterized.
Build proof must be produced from a temp copy outside the repo, not from support/dashboard in the working tree.
Checker probes remain support evidence only and do not prove source truth, quality, success, Movement authority, or external deploy reliability.

bake verb write-round-trip in this sandbox
production HTTP /ingest 503 behavior beyond direct function probe
external Cloud Run + IAP deployment correctness
absence of future support-authority leaks beyond inspected current files
clean physical worktree artifact state because ignored support/dashboard/node_modules, dist, and public/dashboard-data.json are present

observed_evidence.artifact_residue: Ignored support/dashboard/node_modules/, dist/, and public/dashboard-data.json are physically present; node_modules contains token/credential path segments such as @babel/generator/lib/token-map.js and caniuse-lite/data/features/credential-management.js.
observed_evidence.bake_verb_shape: support/operator/dashboard_export.py adds bake_dashboard_snapshot() plus --bake-dashboard CLI writing support/dashboard/public/dashboard-data.json by default.
blocked_commands: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPATH=support/import_identity python3 support/checkers/check_profile.py --profile read_side_projection_boundary -> blocked by read-only write attempt under project/checker-projection-fixture-vessel.
direct dashboard_productization kernel -> blocked because no usable temporary directory was available.
bake round-trip probe -> blocked because no usable temporary directory was available.
npm --prefix support/dashboard run build -> operator error against task rule; read-only sandbox blocked Vite timestamp write, and no timestamp artifact was found afterward.

observed_evidence.checkout: cwd=/Users/smith/projects/BRICK-wt-dash; observed dirty files are pre-existing workspace state, not edits made by this Agent return.
observed_evidence.current_diff_scope: Tracked changes are under support/checkers, support/dashboard, and support/operator/dashboard_export.py; support/dashboard/DEPLOY.md is untracked; no tracked brick/, agent/, link/, or project/ edits were observed.
observed_evidence.deploy_doc_shape: support/dashboard/DEPLOY.md documents delegated access, Cloud Run + IAP reference, generic Docker behind reverse proxy, bare Node, seed baking, secret rotation, and scale-to-zero snapshot semantics.
observed_evidence.direct_guard_probe: node import probe returned {productionMissing:false, productionDev:false, productionSet:true, developmentMissing:true}.
observed_evidence.server_ingest_guard: support/dashboard/server/index.mjs defines NODE_ENV/RAW_INGEST_SECRET and ingestSecretIsConfigured(); POST /ingest checks the production missing/dev-secret guard before x-ingest-secret comparison; /dashboard-data.json static fallback remains outside the ingest route.
observed_evidence.ui_label_shape: labels.js now maps Movement only as forward/reroute, and Link.jsx uses movementKo() for those displayed Movement values.

proposed_changes: Before closure, remove or avoid all in-repo build residue for the attempt path: run npm ci/build only in a temp copy outside the repo and verify support/dashboard/node_modules and support/dashboard/dist are absent from the physical worktree used for path-guard proof.
Expand Cloud Run + IAP recipe if the work step requires exact IAP setup commands, because the current doc gives exact gcloud run deploy/update commands but only prose for putting IAP in front.
Keep DEPLOY.md parameterized; do not add concrete Smith, org, project, URL, run.app, credential body, or provider-session values.

Add or run a behavioral production fail-closed probe in addition to source needles: missing/dev INGEST_SECRET under NODE_ENV=production should refuse POST /ingest while static viewing remains available.

Tighten remaining UI jargon leaks in Building graph surfaces: visible '게이트 통과' and internal pass/stop naming should be changed to non-judgmental observation wording such as gate observed/waiting, without adding redesign or new i18n machinery.
Keep checker additions inside existing profile/kernel surfaces; do not add a standalone support/checkers/check_dashboard_*.py unless separately admitted.

relevant_current_structure.checker_surfaces: support/checkers/check_profile.py dispatches dashboard_productization; support/checkers/lib/kernel_checks.py implements its probes; read_side_projection_boundary.yaml includes the kernel and DEPLOY.md path pin.
relevant_current_structure.dashboard_runtime: support/dashboard contains React/Vite UI, zero-dependency Node server, Dockerfile, ignore files, and DEPLOY.md.
relevant_current_structure.path_admission: support/checkers/check_package_path_admission.py admits DEPLOY.md in support/dashboard and residue-filters node_modules, dist, and generated dashboard-data.json.
relevant_current_structure.projection_operator: support/operator/dashboard_export.py builds dashboard_export_packet and now contains the candidate bake verb.
relevant_current_structure.ui_surfaces: labels.js centralizes Korean labels; Link.jsx currently reflects forward/reroute instead of stop/return.

returned.returned_summary: local CLI Agent Adapter returned support evidence
unchanged_surfaces: No app login, account, cookie, or session system should be added.
No scheduler, queue, retry runtime, webhook delivery, Slack delivery, or database should be added.
No brick/, agent/, link/, or project/ mutation is needed for this design.
Docker runtime should remain self-contained and copy only dist plus server.
Dashboard packets remain projections over repo ledger evidence, not source truth.
